[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011100100 4
1 111110111 8
2 111010110 6
3 111011000 5
4 001000111 4
5 101010110 5
6 110101101 6
7 011000111 5
